title: Honghuang Ling Zun
titleNative: 洪荒灵尊
synopsis: Above mortals, immortality is prosperous. In this world of cultivating immortals and practicing Taoism, the first thing is money. Chu Tian, ​​a poor student of Tianfeng College, inherited a huge fortune of tens of billions, thus starting a period of "manipulation". Golden Journey”. Based on the principle of "not wasting social resources", Chutian bought a top-notch mansion, equipped it with the best equipment, monopolized Tianfeng City's high-end boutique elixirs and talismans, lived a life of spending money like water, and truly reached the superego state of treating money like dirt. At this time, under the calm surface of Tianfeng City, an undercurrent surged, and the dark forces in the city's wolfish ambition to dominate the world was clearly revealed. Soon Chutian was targeted by the dark forces and developed a hatred for it, and was hunted down by the dark forces.

title: Cong Gu Huo Niao Kaishi: Long Cheng Fengyun
titleRomaji: Cong Gu Huo Niao Kaishi: Long Cheng Fengyun
titleNative: 从姑获鸟开始之龙城风云
synonyms: Cong Gu Huo Niao Kaishi: Long Cheng Fengyun
从姑获鸟开始之龙城风云
บันทึกการผจญภัยคุ้มมังกร
synopsis: Li Yan, a martial artist with extraordinary talent, has only a few months left to live due to a terminal illness. When he was in a desperate situation, he accidentally met a man who called himself "Tapir" and was sent into a fruit of the "Yanfu Fruit Tree". Li Yan must complete three tasks issued by the system within the time limit, and earn money through boxing matches in exchange for Yanfu points to buy medicine that can cure terminal illnesses. As he gets to know Longyuan Fortress where he is located, Li Yan is gradually involved in the disputes in the fortress, and he also realizes that there are other Yanfu Walkers competing with him in secret. After overcoming many difficulties, Li Yan finally successfully completed the task and gained a new life.

title: Pukkulapottas and Hours in the Forest
titleEnglish: Pukkulapottas and Hours in the Forest
titleNative: プックラポッタと森の時間
synopsis: This is my report about a mysterious creature that "Watashi" found the year when normal came to a stop all around the globe. All over the world, people were forced to stay at home in the spring of the year, "Watashi" decided to stop commuting to the city and "Watashi" stayed home every day. One day, "Watashi" discovered mysterious traces in my garden. "Watashi" set up a camera to find out what it might be. My camera captured a dwarf about 15 cm tall. "Watashi" named it "Pukkulapottas" and become absorbed in searching for it. However, as the world gradually returned to normal.Pukkulapottas disappears from my sight. "Watashi" could no longer see Pukkulapottas Is what we see, all there is to truth? Through my experience with Pukkulapottas, "Watashi" wondered.

title: Miaoshou Xiandan
titleNative: 妙手仙丹
synopsis: After the death of her adoptive family at the hands of cultivator bandits, Xie Xi Gu sets out to become a cultivator herself. The world of cultivation is a cutthroat one, biased towards those with inate talent, fortunate families, and a lot of money. What Xie Xi lacks in those three qualities, she makes up for effort... and an absurd amount of strength!

title: Di Ba
titleNative: 帝霸
synopsis: Over the years, countless powerful cultivators have come and gone. But the world never realized that behind every powerful cultivator, there seemed to be a mysterious... Dark Crow. After the Dark Crow guided a legion of young cultivators to the peak of cultivation and established their own sects, he chose to leave the world behind. Thousands of years have passed since his departure, and the once mighty sects have become weak and in danger of failing. Finally the Dark Crow returned in the form of a young man, here to fulfill his promise to defend the sects. (Source: Tencent, translated)

title: Sukima no Kuni no Polta
titleNative: スキマの国のポルタ
synopsis: This is a story about a country of "Sukima", a tranquil country that is in between the worlds. Porta, the hero in this story leisurely delivers parcels for everyone in town, riding on Robaroba, his partner. Will Porta be able to deliver important parcels safely? Zouzou, Kabakaba and variety of other characters are expected to be in the story. This is the first original animation of Ryoji Arai, the winner of Astrid Lindgren Award.

title: Jinwu Wei: Feng Qi Jingling
titleNative: 金吾卫之风起金陵
synonyms: Jinwu Guard: The Wind Rises in Jinling
synopsis: Thunder and fire kill people, rumors spread, and rat-faced sinister soldiers rampage across the imperial capital. Everything seems to point to the secrets of the former dynasty that were wiped out by thunder and fire. A pair of hands brought three very different young men together. Jing Yifei, the cold and proud female master of Jinwu Guard, was ordered to find out the truth about the rat soldiers. Bai Qi, the descendant of Jieyi who lives in seclusion in the mountains, led his master to go down the mountain to find a young machine master to join the Jinwu Guard. But the person he was looking for, Qin Ming, was deceiving and abducting him!? As the three of them continued to work together, they gradually came closer to the truth about Lei Huo. (Source: iq.com)
